pubmed_links: [Ito et al. (2007) Schizophrenomimetics upregulate CCN1 in adult neocortex](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/17608974/); [Malik et al. (2015) CCN family matricellular proteins and the nervous system](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/26157362/)
summary: CCN1 (CYR61) encodes a matricellular signaling protein whose neocortical expression is markedly upregulated by schizophrenomimetic agents (phencyclidine, dizocilpine, methamphetamine) in adult but not infant rodents, paralleling the age-dependent onset of schizophrenia; direct genetic evidence in human patients is lacking. (novel candidate)
